title: Lack of quality education in schools in India is the problem that we are trying
problem_definition: Lack of quality education in schools in India is the problem that we are trying to address. This problem stands in the way of their development of both education and the students in the future.
problem_description: The problem we are trying to address is that many students are not getting quality education across India. while we have managed to bring education to most students in our country, we have not been able to ensure quality to all. Also, there is no provision in our traditional educational system to incorporate the new technologies that can make teaching a better experience. This remains the main reason why the Indian educational system lags behind other countries. Also, our system is exam oriented which leads students to tension because of which they cannot study for their exams.
target_user_group: There are 472 million students in India who are studying in schools today. By our project, in one way or another, aim to impact all of them. But our main targets are the teachers as our application would making teaching much easier for them. They are almost like stuck in the past and this was clearly seen when students struggled in the covid crisis. Teachers have neither much time nor effective tools. Our project gives them both. Therefore, govt school teachers are our main targets.
problem_urgency: Several studies indicate that the Indian educational system is extremely flawed. We are creating a generation of students with very little actual knowledge. If India has to become a developed country, this issue must be resolved as soon as possible. A country is always judged by the quality of the students studying there. Students of India are incapable of competing in the international level. This is shown by the sheer number of students studying abroad. Our own students do not trust our own system. If our system keeps going at this rate we are not getting anywhere.
solution: Our solution is to make a mobile application where students can attend white board classes with teachers, have conversations, ask their doubts, and can learn efficiently. This app can track the knowledge gained by students in every step and automatically relay the info to the teachers. We have added features to help the students become more interested in studies and created a unique system in order to keep the app as accessible as possible at the same time being profitable-that is a credit recharge system. Students can recharge their accounts and as they use the app, the recharge keeps reducing. We have planned to create tie-ups with education tech providers for their tech. To reach even remote parts of India through our app. Teacher’s app will have tools that can assign assignments and track performance in addition to the above. Then this app even gives suggestions on their future careers.
solution_benefits: This solution is unique in the sense that it is a complete educational solution in itself and at the same time the layout makes it user friendly. This app helps students in not going astray or getting addicted mainly. This app tracks the student’s performance and lays it right in front of them. The news section that gives carrier advice brings in info about so many opportunities that the students would surely have missed without the app. In the highly competitive world of today, having constant monitoring and the world's best tools at one's finger tips will be an advantage par compare. Not only as individuals, but society as a whole will gain a distinct benefit by the large-scale use of the app. It will also help in development of India as a country. The real-world tests that we plan to launch in our schools hopefully prove the same.
why_best_equipped: Equipment for making an idea into reality includes several things and we believe that we have all of those things. We belong to a place and atmosphere where there are several people who are ready to help us in every stage of the journey. We also have the tools needed to effectively market the application. We also have experienced and studied the problems of being a student and came to the conclusion that this is the kind of application needed to solve their problems. As per the capital, the school has an ATL lab that provides for resources and funding. We also have the very important will to help other to this project. We are also a good team that complement each other perfectly. Thus, we have the knowledge, resources and the will to make this idea a success

title: Teachers and school management are finding difficult to ensure the safety of
problem_definition: Teachers and school management are finding difficult to ensure the safety of students individually. Parents are also worried about the condition and safety of their children at school. Nationally, there is rising trend of child abductions in India.
problem_description: Safety of students is a headache of teachers and school management while they are at school. Students can be abducted at any circumstances. Though the school provides maximum security for the children, there are always bad news of child abduct from the school or outside.
target_user_group: Teachers, parents, students and school management are benefitted with our solution. Teachers are unable to have the attention on students while they are on playground. During the interval and other times teachers and school management is not available to ensure the security of students.
problem_urgency: Child abduction rate is increasing. Increasing rate of child abduction is a threat to the society. Thus, it is an urgent need to solve and ensure the lives of children.
solution:
SAFECHAMP is a device that tracks the presence of a child at school within the defined range and it keeps sending the live updates of the student to the teacher in charge and parents. If the child crosses the defined range during the school time, it sends notifications and emergency alert to teacher-in-charge and parents or the person assigned. SAFECHAMP is a gps activated device which tracks the location of student 24x7. 
The tracking and notifications/alerts are done through interfacing the device with an android app.
solution_benefits: Parents, teachers and school management can ensure the security of each and every student though the notifications and status of child while they are outside home. If the student is in danger, then it will be easy for the parents and police to locate the child.
why_best_equipped: We are equipped to offer this solution with our skills. We can provide the best solution to ensure the safety of students.

 Reputation

problem_definition:

problem_description:

2. Due to less physical interaction with teachers and peer group, students' personality development has affected.
3.Rural Schools are not able to afford online teaching and have limited access to desired technical devices.
target_user_group:
1. Students and teachers both are facing challenges in this testing and trying times.
2. Students of higher classes are mainly affected on studies front and junior students are not getting the personal interaction which is required for their overall development.
3. Other user group which we are targeting are students from rural backgrounds which are having little access to technology and educational infrastructure.

2. It's a critical time for students as it will effect their career and future if required support is not available to them.

• Better clarity of concept among students

title: Problem statement - The inaccessibility of students in rural areas to
problem_definition: Problem statement - The inaccessibility of students in rural areas to communicate to teachers.
problem_description: In these times, the education system in rural villages had a massive setback. Its either study(but taking risk of getting infected) or not going to school and not study. Due to this students are having a hard time for just to clear doubts. Students of class 10 and 12 are most affected because of their board exams and even though Boards have reduced their syllabus, it is still difficult there to interact with teachers.
target_user_group: User group for this project would be students from rural areas who are having difficulty communicating with teachers and teachers who are having difficulty in taking classes. Basically all the rural areas where student do not have acces to internet to study while following socil distancing.
problem_urgency: This problem is critical and needs an urgent solution as students of classes 10 and 12 who have to appear for board examinations are having difficulty in understanding and interacting with teachers. Board examination are one of the most important examination in a student's life and these exams have potential to change student's future but due to this covid 19, students in rural area have a massive setback and hence it is important to find a way for students to communicate and interact with teachers safely.
solution: Solution is to use a raspberry pi combined with a wifi modem(it is not important that modem have internet access). The only requirement would be that students should have a cell phone which has wifi option. Nowadays most phones have these even the cheap ones and button ones. The modem would be used to connect all the devices to raspberry pi and then raspberry pi would be used as a local server to take online classes. Teacher would be using the raspberry pi and using its camera feature they will take online classes. in order for students to post doubts there can be a QNA panel on the server from which teacher can read doubts.
solution_benefits: My solution gives benifit to users as they won't be going out to study and the local teacher will take classes. And instead of buying internet connection for everyphone we can just make an initial investment and then continue studying. It requires minimal maintainence and it can be cleaned by ourselves also. So with this they will be able to study without any problem, interact without a problem and hence can study well and cover the gap which was made by the covid 19 in their studies.

I have participated in Toyota's Road Safety Hackathon at IIT Delhi and won 6th position hence i know about the technical aspects about my project. title: Students are forced to study all subjects despite their interests. And for
problem_definition: Students are forced to study all subjects despite their interests. And for languages, they read chapters, rather than focusing on grammar.
problem_description: Students need to study all the subjects despite their interest in a particular one. This diverts their mind during classes. Also, they lose interest in the subjects they used to like before the pressure. This makes them feel bored, and thus they stop paying attention in those few classes which they used to pay attention to earlier. Languages though should not have a choice. But there is still an issue with them. There are more chapters than grammar, and being able to answer questions from a chapter is good, but is not going to help children in the future.
target_user_group: This idea, in my opinion, will help both the students and the school. The students will be able to pay more attention in class, and the teacher, would not have to waste the time of the class, just asking the students to pay attention, and scolding them if they do not listen to the teacher. This interest of students in the classes will help them in having a better understanding of the concept, and the school result will also flourish.
problem_urgency: According to me, this problem is not critical in the early stages but can be fatal for students later in their life, when they will not have enough knowledge about their job, or otherwise as well, if they would not take interest in the work, they would do based on the subjects which had to study. And, that can also cause some serious stress later on, if they feel the burden of being pressurized to study all the subjects whatsoever.
solution: The right way to handle this problem is to allow the students to choose the subject that intrigues them even before the stream system starts in class 11. They should be allowed to study only the subjects they like. This will help them as they would not have the burden of the other subjects. The basics of the other subjects should be taught just in case they change their mind later on. And as far as languages are concerned, they should not have a choice in them, but rather, they should be taught the grammar of the language rather than the chapters they are asked to read in class. Reading should be done, but not until Class 10.
solution_benefits: This will reduce the burden on students, and their stress to study the subjects they find hard, for the exams. Also, the school will be able to pay more attention to the students based on the subjects they choose. Implementing this idea will allow students to relax and do their work. Rather than having to stay up for the work and having to look up google for answers, they are not sure of. Other than that, the teaching of grammar for languages will help the students in the future when they will have to answer questions related to general knowledge and will have to speaking order to reply.
why_best_equipped: Since we are free to express our views/thoughts, it is imperative that ideas from one and all including kids like me should be welcomed. title:
1. Problem of missing certificates. 
2. only academic based future system.
3.
problem_definition:

2. only academic based future system.
3. brain drain in India.
4. increasing stress and mental tension in youth.
problem_description:
1. Education is the main aim of
everybody whether it is a child or an
adult. Not all children are alike; some are
good at studies; some are good at sports;
some at computers; some at arts and so
on. But in report cards or while applying
for any job etc. we are only concerned about
the academic percentage. There must be
something which keeps a record of his
extra cocurricular activities too.
2. Moreover, whenever we have to
apply for higher education or a job, we
have to carry all of our precious records
(documents and certificates). which is a 
very difficult job. Sometimes some left at
home or in the way or get stolen or
misplaced. Then, it becomes difficult for
the one to rearrange the particular
certificate from different institutes. It
results in wastage of time, money and
also give rise to mental tension.
So, there must be something that reduces
wastage of our time and money.
target_user_group:
All kids, youngsters, adults, schools, colleges,
companies and even Indian economy needs a
solution for this problem.
problem_urgency:
This problem needs an urgent solution
because lack of knowledge, unavailability
of resources, our young and budding brain
are either going to abroad or sinking in the
darkness of drugs. To save brain drain in
India and to inculcate confidence in our
youngsters, it is very important to bring an 
innovative and technical solution of this
problem. I have one solution for many problems.
solution:
So, my solution for this problem is: -
      Achievement Credit Card

It is not a credit card of money, but it is a card
of achievements ✌a person has done in his
lifetime. It will be like a digital storing of
achievements credits earned by an
individual.
solution_benefits:
1. It will keep a record of a person's
academics, cognitive, affective and
psychometric domains.
2. It will keep a copy of all certificates
achieved by a person.
3. Achievement credit will be stored in
digital locker.
4. Whenever we went to get a job, we
have to just show our ‘Achievement
Credit Card’.
5. It will have a code like Aadhaar card.
It will be linked with a software like
Aadhaar card is. On putting the specified
code through its linked software schools,
colleges or Job Centers can easily see ones
related certificates and documents.
6. This achievement card would also
help in decreasing the corruption. as now
a days we used to hear that the people are
making the fake certificates and getting
the good jobs. While deserving candidates
are facing problems. So, my achievement
credit card will help in decreasing
corruption to a great extent.
7. In my achievement credit card, the
people would not be able to make 
changes in marks, details or any other
thing. In other words, it will be
unalterable for a common man. The
access to Achievement card would only be
given to the education departments.
8.Education department will issue it with the start of an academic carrier for the freshers and for others these will be issued by the respective HEI's.

I think my solution is the best in every sense
as no one has ever thought of keeping e -
record of all the hard work one has done
through out of his carrier. This will reduce a
great burden.

as some one is good at piano ..but saying some one that I know piano sounds not so good .. but when one show him the certificates regarding music, he had gained during his schooling or in other fields, it will be quite impressive. title:
1. Immature students using abusive language in class(even with teachers!).
2.
problem_definition:

(a) Joining class by putting ID and then Password
(b) Teacher manually taking attendance. (in some cases, up to 30mins are wasted!)
4. (Most of the) Teachers not having enough knowledge to make slides and notes digitally.
5. Students leaving the class after attendance is taken. (How ingeniously stupid!)

So, how can teachers conduct quizzes if students keep filling junk in the chat?
How can students enjoy the class if the problems mentioned above persist?
problem_description:
Ex 1 - Once in Biology class, the teacher was asking questions. Students had to raise hand, then they were unmuted by the teacher. If someone mutes again, the whole process had to be repeated.
Ex 2 - Students have to join the classes by entering the password every day, which is time-consuming.
Ex 3 - Teachers have to disable the chat and audio too. (in order to main the decorum of the class)
Ex 4 - School has to send messages about the classes and students have to view them to get the password and details. (Everyday!)
Ex 5 - Online classes are not 'fun'. (according to some students).
Ex 6 - My maternal aunt has to sit with her daughter all the time during class. (Because my sister is studying in junior classes.

These are just a few examples. But, I suppose the problem is quite clear. Isn't it?
target_user_group:
Yeah, sure. Most of the consumers would be students, teachers, and educational institutes. (Companies as well if they need a modified version of this for professional use).

There will be a simpler version of this app for younger students whose parents need to sit with them during classes.

Our market will be the education industry spanning from schools, coaching institutions, private tuitions, to online courses, and colleges.
problem_urgency:
Interferences with online class can be tolerated if they happen very rarely. But this has become a daily problem. Imagine being a student and spending 5 minutes just to join a single class. Imagine being a teacher and spending 10 - 15 minutes just admitting the students and taking attendance. And Imagine being a mother and sitting with your daughter for 3 hours just making sure that she's taking the class. 

Doesn't seem much? Imagine doing this 6 times a week for 1 year. And congrats, you have successfully wasted between 28 Hours to 6 WEEKS of your life doing nothing!

That is exactly why this problem is absolutely critical and needs an efficient solution ASAP! We are humans after all and we are not made to do things which a machine can do for us.
solution:
Simply put, I want to make an App + Web App which uses AI to filter out offensive and abusive messages from the chat and report the school about the student who did it. 
* The students/teachers/users have to log on and their schedule will appear they simply need to click one button to join the class. 
* The students can monitor their class performance at whole new level.
* The classes will be recorded as per the wish of the institution. (for student's)
* Automatic attendance will be taken
* Easy and friendly mode for junior students
* And everything else one might need (like notes, quizzes)

Important - 
* There will be a reminder after sometime to ensure that the student is actively taking the class (like You Tube)
* Personal / Group battle front for students (battle of knowledge of course! through quizzes, problems, any thing else people can come up with). [ I'm trying to gamify the process of online learning so it is much more likeable ] 

Future - 
* Virtual science labs for students who can't access the materials required to perform experiments.

This all can be used with physical classes. Suppose you are a student and you go to school for 2-3 hours only and at that time, you do practical work and learn something new. Every day would be so much fun...!
solution_benefits:
There are many solutions out there but, none is like this one. I have tried my best to identify the problems of a variety of people and tried to solve all of them with a single app. The fact that ME BEING A STUDENT is also vital for the possible success of the service. Because I can explore and understand the problems better than other people. Also, it is quite tempting as well. Because you can save a lot of time with this. 

More importantly though, if you closely analyse the intent behind me doing this and some MNC doing this, you can quickly see the bigger picture. 
My intent - Earn fame and recognition so that I can go to my college of choice i.e. MIT and have a good future. 
MNC's intent - Earn money by hook or crook. (For example the current situation of WhatsApp)

That's all I had to say on this topic, the rest is up to you.

Can you identify the difference between the food your mother mother made and street/restaurant  food? Why did mother's food was at another level even when compared to the costliest hotels? That's  because the passion behind it. 
Just like that, I'm truly passionate about this project and enjoy every bit of it. This helps me get a super good night sleep. 

As I mentioned earlier as well, I can better understand and 'feel' the situation when compared to someone from the outside. Also, I have no desire to steal people's data and earn money.

title:
THE VIRTUAL PARADOX IN EDUCATION
Online education, one of the areas where
problem_definition:
THE VIRTUAL PARADOX IN EDUCATION
Online education, one of the areas where technology has flourished, has gained popularity amidst the COVID 19 Pandemic but Children with Special Needs suffered a lot due to this giant shift from the conventional offline classes to online clases due to their  socio-emotional and therapeutical needs.
problem_description:
Children with special needs exhibited more troubles, worries or anger because as they have less control over day to day well-being than other people.
Change in the routine/ daily timetable was difficult to follow by CWSN especially for children with ID, ASD and MD which results in anxiety and irritable behaviour.
One to one or face to face teaching/prompting which is very important for CWSN is missing in online/ digital mode of teaching. Parents of children with special needs were required to play the role of teacher, therapist, peer and parent while they work from home.
target_user_group: THE USER GROUP whose problem I am attempting to solve are the CHILDREN WITH SPECIAL NEEDS , It covers CHILDREN with developmental delays, medical conditions, psychiatric conditions, and congenital conditions that require accommodations so children can reach their potentials. At the same time teaching learning process also involves parents and teachers as important stakeholders and thus I tried to give special importance  to the problems faced by well
problem_urgency: .According to census reports, there are approximately 2.68 crore persons with disabilities in India, i.e. 2.21% of the total population. Many global estimates, in fact, reveal that it is a gross underestimation, and the number could be as high as 18% of the total population. However, despite being a significant part of our population, their concerns are rarely brought to light.he State of Education Report for India 2019 states that there are 7,864,636 children with disabilities in India. Out of these, 61% aged between 5 and 19 were attending educational institutions. But when classes shifted online, logistics and mechanisms were looked at without concern about whether they are CWSN-friendly. As a result,children with special needs and their parents are finding it difficult to cope with the sudden shift to the online mode.
solution:
Using Technology as a tool for solving this huge problem , I am in the process of making an app which connects the 2 most important stakeholders for the education of CWSN i.e. Parents of CWSN and teachers. This App will be a major boost for educating CWSN , and will be specially personalised for them keeping in mind their problems and necessary solutions. Also keeping in mind economical aspects , for CWSN belonging to Economically Weaker Sections ,  Resource Centres will act as a connection for the teachers and parents using this app (Resource centres in conjunction with special educators will support the rehabilitation and educational needs of learners - NEP 2020)
Detailed Description of The App is attached as A PPT
solution_benefits:
Making virtual space inclusive is extremely crucial to ensure social justice, equality and equity for the future generations. This app will definitely reduce the pain and tension faced by the parents as well as teachers and help in educating the CWSN through the online mode which is actually the NEW NORMAL.
We cannot let gaps to come in the education of different children due to reasons beyond their control.
why_best_equipped: I emphatise with CWSN , and being a school student I can relate to the problems that they might face especially during online classes. Thus while planning the layout of this app I have tried to address all these problems so that even A PANDEMIC cannot stop from the aspects of Education. Online education , which we used to call the future reality has already become a part of our lives and thus through this app we can extend the benefits of Online Education with the Children with Special Needs as well.

title: Students don’t know how to study effectively enough to achieve a personal
problem_definition: Students don’t know how to study effectively enough to achieve a personal understanding of each subject that they can use effectively in their life’s work.
problem_description: No time, no hours, are spent on the subject of study, as a subject, from the viewpoint of the student, learning the technology of that subject, and students are basically taught nothing within the actual scope of the actual subject of study.Teachers on the other hand spend four to five years in college, say 10,000 hours or 12,000 hours with graduate school, and 180/220 plus credit hours of courses learning what is required of a teacher “to teach.” Then there is continuing education, on the subject of “teaching” (For Professional Engineers in my state this is 15 credit hours more per year, for life.) but nothing on the subject of study. For the student there might be something about having a place to study, having a quiet place, having a plan, being told “everyone learns differently,” using the library and scheduling one’s time.
target_user_group: One educator, Phil Power, Bridge Magazine says that every Governor of Michigan since 1970 has pointed up this problem, and it has not been fixed. Mr Power says, “We do not know what skills will be needed in 15 years, so we can’t teach those skills.” he pointed out this the biggest problem of the world and It could be solved
problem_urgency: A child needs to know what is expected of a student to know, study wise, and what exactly they are to do, as a student. Not as a human-being only, just sitting in a chair, “seat time,” with the teacher and school being paid for him or her to only sit there, asleep, unconscious, or awak
solution:
The basic element of our language is the word. For a student to understand what an author, or their teacher, says or has written they need to understand the words the author is using. A student can learn this by looking up each word that is not understood in a proper dictionary and fully defining how it is used in our culture, as well as that one specific context. If the word has a special meaning that has to be defined and understood.

Here is a basic principle from the subject of study, that might serve as an example:

The only reason a student becomes unable to learn is that they have gone past a word that was not understood.

So the idea is that a student can be “able to learn” and then become “unable to learn”. This principle says there is an exact reason for the inability to learn.
solution_benefits: This solution will give a huge benefit in the education system. This solution will help the students to be able to learn things.So for my research I might want to start with what a person looks like that is fully able to learn.
why_best_equipped: I think I am best equipped to offer this solution because I have researched alot about this problem and many studies show that this solution will help students alot. title: By seeing the present situation, it has now become necessity that we should
problem_definition: By seeing the present situation, it has now become necessity that we should boycott chinese products and should build our own industries. Though industrialisation will help to increase  the economy of India but at the same time many harmful gases will also be released by industries. So, it is important to manage this problem. Industries release many gases such as methane, halocarbons, nitrogen dioxide, carbon monoxide etc. One the most dangerous gas released by industries is carbon monoxide. If a person is closed in a room where carbon monoxide is there, that person may die as it directly affects the lungs of that person. And if it will be released in the atmosphere then it can also create difficulty for people to breath.
problem_description: Inhalation causes central nervous system damage and asphyxiation. Prolonged exposure to carbon monoxide rich atmospheres may be fatal. It is easily ignited. It is just lighter than air and a flame can flash back to the source of leak very easily. Under prolonged exposure to fire or intense heat the containers may violently rupture and rocket. Carbon monoxide gas leaves the body the same way it got in lungs. In fresh air, it takes four to six hours for a victim of carbon monoxide to exhale about half of the inhaled carbon monoxide in their blood. Given below are some dangerous effects which can be caused by carbon monoxide.
target_user_group: Workers working in industry may die due to CO or carbon monoxide. Or people that live near industrial areas can also get affected by CO. The managers of that company, infact any people near the industry can get affected.
problem_urgency: This problem is critical and needs an urgent solution as not only because of boycott of chinese products but also because of increasing population in India, it is mandatory to increase industrialisation in India. And if industries will be built then it will release some harmful gases also as everything have some advantages and disadvantages. Though it will help to make the economy of India stronger, at the same time if not taken care of this problem, then most of the population can get affected and then in their treatment money will be used. At last, economy will again come at the previous rank.
solution: The name of my idea is TOXIC TRANSMOGRIFY. Here the toxic refers to carbon monoxide or CO which is a single carbon compound and it is very dangerous for health. As the name suggests it will transform the toxic into a non-harmful substance. My idea will mainly solve the problem of air pollution & can give us fresh air to breath. I know that there are many other gases also in air but this can be startup plan as everyone starts from zero only. Electrochemical sensor will trap CO and then it will react with Cuprous Chloride& Hydrochloric Acid to be non-harmful. It will also help to separate different gases coming out of industries which can be used further for various purposes.
solution_benefits: My solution gives a distinct benefit to users as it will give everyone the fresh air to breath to great extent. As the population is increasing, with the same way the air pollution is also increasing. I know that when there was lockdown because of COVID-19, the air pollution decreased. But now people are coming back to their normal lives and the same problem is coming again. It can also help to reduce the risk of diseases caused by polluted air such as chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), ischaemic heart disease, etc.

title: Approximately 76% of air pollution across the world is caused by burning of
problem_definition: Approximately 76% of air pollution across the world is caused by burning of fossil fuels from automobiles. This not only includes greenhouse gas emissions but also the release of toxic contaminants such as the SPM, Carbon Monoxide, Unburnt Hydrocarbons and other harmful particulate matter. The true costs of coal, natural gas and other fossil fuels are not always obvious but their effects and impacts could be disastrous.
problem_description:
Fossil fuels like petroleum, coal as well as natural gas are currently the world's elementary energy source. Formed from organic material over the course of millions of years, fossil fuels have fueled global economic development over the past century. Yet they are non-renewable finite resources and they can also irreparably and inevitably harm the environment and the natural ecosystem. . Unravelling this tangled web is as complex as it is urgent if we are to avoid the frightening consequences of runaway climate chaos. We must decarbonize our global economy by mid-century to avoid the worst possible outcomes.
It is a key priority to establish the framework for a robust economic future for the workers and communities who sacrificed to produce the fossil fuels that built our modern economy.
target_user_group: This project serves the entire society by reducing the air pollution caused by automobiles. People who are driven to reduce pollution in the environment but cannot afford electric/hybrid vehicles are a perfect fit. I would also like to mention that It is my aim to ensure that Governments of developing and 3rd world countries like India should make it mandatory to equip vehicles with these kits to ensure an effective way of combating pollution.
problem_urgency: In 2007 the UN’s Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (IPCC) presented their fourth assessment report, which speaks about a very high confidence (>90%) that the globally averaged net effect of human activities since pre-industrial times has been one of global warming. According to the report this global warming effect has been caused by a human induced, dramatic increase of atmospheric concentrations of greenhouse gasses. For a large part, this increase has been the result of the exploitation and combustion of fossil fuels. Other predicted side-effects of the increasing atmospheric greenhouse gas concentrations and global warming include the increasing frequency of extreme weather events (e.g., storms, floods), changes in amount and pattern of precipitation, acidification of the oceans, dramatic changes of ecosystems, expansion of tropical diseases, and change of global agricultural patterns. Although the severity of many of these side-effects is uncertain, the threat alone already urges for an increase of political attention. According to the U.S. Energy Information Administration, the burning of fossil fuels was responsible for 76 percent of U.S greenhouse gases (carbon dioxide, methane and nitrous oxide) emissions in 2016. These gases contribute to the greenhouse affect or global warming and could lead to potentially catastrophic changes in the Earth’s climate.
solution:
Our proposed project tackles this grave issue by using hydrogen as an energy carrier .Hydrogen has the highest of calorific value of all known fuels and most importantly does not give rise to any green- house gas. Hydrogen is an environmentally friendly alternative to fossil fuels, and it can be used to power just about any machine needing energy. It is fuel efficient and a renewable source of energy .

Ignite.Ly provides solutions to the problems faced by existing hydrogen fuel cells and the implementation and use of hydrogen as a fuel in relatively developing and globalizing economies such as that of India or of developing countries of Africa and South America as well.
Our kit overcomes the problem of reducing the expense of use of hydrogen as a fuel.  Although, hydrogen cells are now being used to power hybrid cars, it’s still not a feasible source of fuel for everyone. However we have developed our kit in such a way that it makes the whole process a lot simpler Since its very difficult to replace the existing infrastructure  we have designed our kit in such a way that it can be used as an additive to the existing engines of motor vehicles. As hydrogen is extremely inflammable and very difficult to store, our kit employs the electrolytic decomposition of water for production of hydrogen . This ensures that the required safety measures are fulfilled by our proposed project.
solution_benefits:
Our proposed product is one of the non-paralleled kits that can do the very least to secure a clean ,healthy and sustainable future for us ,our future generations and our very own beloved planet, Earth.
Our kit not only reduces air pollution caused by automobiles but also reduces the cost of fuel used. As estimated by us, a person riding a motorcycle can save up to Rs.3760/- for every 2000kms driven.
Our kit can be easily installed in the existing engines and requires little maintenance. The installation cost is negligible and it is a cost-proficient alternative to electric/hybrid cars serving and fulfilling the same purpose.

title: In India there are very less job opportunities for specially abled people and
problem_definition: In India there are very less job opportunities for specially abled people and teenagers which gives rise to the problem of unemployment among these specific groups.
problem_description:
Following the age long culture of the Traditional Indian Society the children in India have been and are being brought up in such a way that leads to a lot of problems in their teens and adulthood. Their upbringing makes their brain so sensitive that they are neither not able to adapt to the real world quickly when they grow up nor able to adjust themselves easily to perform what the job requires of them. 
In India teenagers have almost to no jobs available easily to them and even if they are able to find some they are mostly not helpful in improving their skills to prepare them for their ambitions.
More than 26 million people i.e 2.21% of the entire Indian Population come under the specially abled category.
2.41 % of the male and 2.01% of the female population in India is specially abled. Out of the 26.8 million people under the specially abled category a little less than 10 million people are only employed which is only 37.3% of the entire specially abled population. This figure is really very disturbing and a major cause of concern for us which is what we as founders of this company are trying to resolve.
